name: Hillary Clinton
subject: The polls are all over the place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
We can work our hearts out | Friend --

Three weeks from today, we'll know who won the Iowa caucuses and New Hampshire primary.

If we let our opponent continue to outspend us on the airwaves in those two states, we could wake up three weeks from now facing a dramatically different campaign.

**[I know we can win this election, and our clearest path to victory is through Iowa and New Hampshire. As we get down to the wire, will you chip in $1 so we can win them?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ1MTg2NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyNzcxNDA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I try not to pay too much attention to the polls, because right now they're all over the place -- some have us up, others have us down.

**The only thing we can do right now is work our hearts out to put ourselves in a position to win. Chip in $1 right now, and let's go do it:** | [ | [**Donate now**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ1MTg2NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyNzcxNDA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
Dear Friend,

We have seen an incredible coalition of conservatives rise up and
redefine politics because of their courageous stand to take back
power from Washington. It's been a long fight, but we're not
going to give in now. Conservatives know that we must unite to
bring back constitutional government. That means electing a true
conservative leader, not a member of the establishment - and
certainly not a candidate who up until election season has
propped up the Democrats and their agenda.

We have enough
negotiators in Washington, and we don't need a president who may
again find it advantageous to cut more special deals for his
friends.

We need a leader who
has always stood up to Washington, defended the Constitution, and
fought for the American people.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director

name: Rick Santorum
subject: This is the moment!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

This is it! In just 10 days voters in Iowa will begin the process of choosing our next President.
That’s right – February 1st. After all the months of work, it can be startling to think we are just days away. But, we are ready.... Friend, I’ve held nearly 300 town hall meetings with thousands of voters. Our house parties are averaging nearly 80 people per home. And just between this week and next week, I will have held 80 more events here! **It continues to be impressive to see the number of former Cruz & Trump supporters joining our events and our efforts.** My team is working with hundreds of Iowans who are serving as our Team Leaders. We are covering every county in Iowa – recruiting, training and sending out teams of volunteers who are going door to door, making phone calls, pushing our message through their social circles and convincing people to caucus for me! Our message is resonating. And our team is ready. We are surpassing our 2012 goals for caucus captains and we will have connected with every caucus voter FIVE TIMES between now & caucus night.

**But, Friend, this is when I need you the most!** Iowa will set the course for the entire election process -- in New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada and well-beyond. And when we surprise in Iowa, we will lead this country down the right path! One that restores the American Dream & encourages broken families. One that keeps Americans safe. name: Katie McGinty
subject: Add your name: Congress MUST overturn Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7599757189309267968/589430591464669184?refcode=e20160121&refcode2=e20160121&amount=15)
---
Friend,

Since the damaging decision in _Citizens United_ six years ago, our democracy has been for sale. Secret, unlimited campaign contributions have been flooding our electoral system, giving outsized influence to a select few and robbing the American people of their right to one person, one vote.

It's not fair, and it's not right. This kind of unchecked influence is a threat to our democracy, and it's time for all of us to finally stand up and say enough is enough.

[**Sign your name to join me in calling on Congress to overturn _Citizens United_ >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7599757189309267968/661488185502597120?ms=20160121&refcode=e20160121&refcode2=e20160121&amount=15)

The fact is that _Citizens United _is a betrayal of our values - of a democracy that is supposed to be of, by, and for the people. Individuals have bought politicians to secure their own best interests in Washington at the expense of hardworking Americans, and the result has been a government that works in service to the few instead of on behalf of the many.

If we want to make 2016 the year _ Citizens United _is overturned, we need to stand together to demand transparency, fairness, and accountability in our campaign finance system.

**[Add your name to tell Congress to overturn _Citizens United_ and return democracy to the people.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7599757189309267968/661488185502597120?ms=20160121&refcode=e20160121&refcode2=e20160121&amount=15)** Thanks for standing up, Katie

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: The unfortunate anniversary: Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Tomorrow is an unfortunate anniversary. It marks the sixth year since the Supreme Court handed down a damaging decision in _Citizens United_ allowing outside groups to pour unlimited amounts of money into our political system.

As a result, billionaires like the Koch brothers have turned our elections into spending wars. Ultra-wealthy special interests compete to get their message across and their candidates into office.

Not surprisingly, this onslaught of outside money helps corporations and super-rich donors advance their agenda, but it does little to help middle-class families struggling to have their voices heard. And this year promises to be the most expensive yet -- **the Koch network has already pledged to spend $900 million.**

[**Let 's give the Koch brothers a perfect six-year anniversary present: an end to their reign. Stand with me and sign my petition to stop _Citizens United_.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2267/738133e4/3b7af33d/7f838611/2750855881/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160121npm")

The Koch brothers fight for policies harmful to the middle class -- they're against raising the minimum wage; they want to abolish the Affordable Care Act; and they're trying to minimize environmental regulations.

Recently, the Koch brothers have also shown they're prepared to attack anyone who opposes their power source: _Citizens United_. I voiced my support for an end to _Citizens United_ , and the Koch network pounced.

Unfortunately, this is only the beginning. It's still the first month of an election year, and we have a lot of outside spending to withstand. But we can fight back if we work together, speak out and put a stop to _Citizens United_.

[**Let 's make this the last anniversary. Join me and end the influence of outside money in our elections.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2267/738133e4/3b7af33d/7f838611/2750855881/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160121npm")

Thank you,

Patrick

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Citizens United
body:
#
[**If we win this election, we have a chance to overturn Citizens United and take our democracy back from the billionaire class. Please donate $3, or whatever you can afford this week, to support our campaign before Iowa voters caucus in less than two weeks.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9c64/261221362/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/end_citizens_united?refcode=em160121full-pro")
* * *
Dear Sisters and Brothers,
Very little will ever get done until we reform our broken and corrupt campaign finance system. I hear about it everyday. The economic and political systems in this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections.
**Today is the sixth-year anniversary of Citizens United, one of the most disastrous Supreme Court decisions in my lifetime.** This decision hinges on the absurd notion that money is speech, that corporations are people, and that giving huge piles of undisclosed cash in support of politicians in exchange for influence does not constitute corruption.
In essence, this ruling handed millionaires and billionaires -- who have already rigged our economy -- unlimited influence in our elections. It gave billionaires like the Koch Brothers an even bigger opportunity to purchase the House, the Senate, even the White House.
Super PACs -- a direct outgrowth of the Citizens United decision -- are enabling the wealthiest people and the largest corporations in this country to spend unlimited amounts on elections.
**We know, for example, that the Koch brothers, the second wealthiest family in America, want to use the Citizens United decision to buy politicians across the country.** This election cycle alone, they have committed to spend at least $750 million on political activities -- an outrageous sum that is corrupting our political process. And I can assure you, brothers and sisters, they won't be spending that money with the interests of working families, women, and seniors in mind. That is simply unacceptable, and it's time for the American people to rise up and reclaim our democracy.
[**Please contribute $3 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help our growing movement repeal Citizens United and dismantle this corrupt campaign finance system. Together, one small-dollar contribution at a time, we will take our democracy back from the Koch brothers.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9c64/261221362/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/end_citizens_united?refcode=em160121full-pro")
Let's be honest and acknowledge what we are talking about. We are talking about a rapid movement in this country towards a political system in which a handful of very wealthy people and special interests will determine who gets elected or who does not get elected. That is not what this country is supposed to be about. That was not Abraham Lincoln's vision of a government of the people, by the people, and for the people.
The need for real campaign finance reform is not a progressive issue. It is not a conservative issue. It is an American issue. It is an issue that should concern all Americans, regardless of their political point of view, who wish to preserve the essence of the longest standing democracy in the world -- a government that represents all of the people and not a handful of powerful and wealthy special interests.
Our campaign is doing so well because we are telling the truth about the reality of American life today. We are talking about a reality in which most of the new wealth and income in this country are going to the top one percent while working families are struggling more than at any point since the Great Depression.
My vision for American democracy is a nation in which all people, regardless of their income, can participate in the political process, and can run for office without begging for contributions from the wealthy and the powerful. While other politicians will make you the same promise, I am the only candidate running for the Democratic nomination who does not have a super PAC. And I am the only one who is telling the truth about the corrupting influence of Wall Street bankers and the obscenely wealthy in our elections.
We have to create a political revolution where working Americans come together to say they have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying our elections to enrich themselves while everyone else gets poorer. More than ever, we need a president who has a firm commitment to the American people -- and no one else.
[**With less than two weeks until the Iowa caucus, I need your help to win this election and reclaim our democracy. Can you pitch in $3 now to fuel our political revolution before voting begins?**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9c64/261221362/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/end_citizens_united?refcode=em160121full-pro")
Our vision for democracy should be one in which candidates are speaking to the vast majority of our people - working people, the middle class, low-income people, the elderly, the children, the sick, and the poor - and discussing with them their ideas as to how we can improve lives for all people in this country.
I believe this vision of American can be a reality once again. We just have to do something unprecedented in the coming months -- defy the odds and win the Democratic nomination for President of the United States.
I am glad you are standing with us.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9c64/261221362/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/end_citizens_united?refcode=em160121full-pro")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9e39/261221362/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9e26/261221362/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9e27/261221362/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d3d/43f17890/43751114/620e9e24/261221362/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I want to say thanks in person
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
This is our most exciting contest yet | Friend --

I’m so excited to tell you to about the contest we’re running, today only: One supporter will fly out and join me and my family in Iowa on the biggest day yet of this campaign. **[Will you enter for the chance to fly out and meet Bill, Chelsea, and me on Caucus Day?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ1MjUwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyODk0OTE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

While I have the chance, I'd like to tell you how grateful I am that you’ve had my back all these months. We don't only have to talk politics -- I'd like to hear about what you've been up to and what you have planned. And of course, you're welcome to bring a guest!

**Add your name right now to meet me in Iowa:**
| [ | [**I want to be there!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ1MjUwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyODk0OTE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

To enter by contributing click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ1MjUwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyODk0OTE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ1MjUwNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyODk0OTE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner and a guest will receive an invitation to meet the Clintons at a campaign event in Iowa on caucus night, February 1, 2016, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodations (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1,250). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: Re: worst anniversary yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Chris wanted me to make sure you saw his note. We still need 2,310 signatures before midnight tonight. **[Are you in?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c18/70cdc2ba/47b8bf2e/3965dd0/1881950139/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Are+you+in&utm_campaign=em12116&source=em12116")**

Begin forwarded message:

| **ADD YOUR NAME >>> NO CORPORATE TAKEOVER OF OUR ELECTIONS **
**Goal: **5,000 Signatures
**Status of Supporter: [PENDING](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c18/70cdc2ba/47b8bf2e/3965dd1/1881950139/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+PENDING&utm_campaign=em12116&source=em12116") **
---

Corporations and Super PACs should NOT be able to buy and sell elections. Yet, thanks to the disastrous decision in _Citizens United vs. FEC_ , that's exactly what is happening. **[And we need your help to stop this trend.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c18/70cdc2ba/47b8bf2e/3965dee/1881950139/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+And+we+need+your+help+to+stop+this+trend&utm_campaign=em12116&source=em12116")**

With the anniversary of _Citizens United vs. FEC_ coming up this week, it's never been clearer that this is the time to get big money out of our elections. Democracy should not be up for sale to the highest bidder, yet the influx of cash from Super PACs gives outsiders the power to hijack an election.

I've been leading the charge on this issue for years, from authoring the DISCLOSE Act to filing lawsuits in federal courts. But I can't do it alone, and I need your help today.

**[We must gather 5,000 signatures before the anniversary TOMORROW calling for an end to Citizens United and the SuperPac takeover of elections--will you click here and add your name?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c18/70cdc2ba/47b8bf2e/3965def/1881950139/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+We+must+gather+5000+signatures+before+th&utm_campaign=em12116&source=em12116")**

Our opponent, in fact, has a Super PAC pumping out of state money into this Maryland election --they've already spent over $1 million on television ads--and we still have weeks to go! It's only going to get worse from here.

**[Add your name now to my petition to help us get to 5,000 signatures before tomorrow. We really need you. ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c18/70cdc2ba/47b8bf2e/3965dec/1881950139/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+name+now+to+my+petition+to+help&utm_campaign=em12116&source=em12116")**

Chris

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
